item.title: Goldman CEO says markets may take a ‘couple of weeks’ to digest Iran war impact
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)

item.title: EU to lay out local content rules to strengthen manufacturing
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)

item.title: Airline, travel industries scramble with fallout from Middle East conflict
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)
Major Gulf hubs have closed, 21,300 flights have been cancelled leaving passengers stranded, while airline shares tumble and oil prices surge squeezing profits.

item.title: US dollar rally pauses as market sentiment turns a little more upbeat
item.description:
Source: FMT Business (Finance)

Source: FMT Business (Finance)
